scope: sunset axis resolved; SC-SCOPE OPEN on GHAT4-PERTRANSFER + R-U6-1

claims.name: M_ENDPOINT_crosscheck
claims.detail: (production M_fast = 0.104953 vs independent radial trapezoid (kmax=60, n=1e6) = 0.105589 agree to 0.61%; the residual is resonance-peak (k~q0) quadrature resolution + tail treatment, not a value error. M-ENDPOINT is an EXECUTED constant cross-checked at the ~1% level; the analytic tail beyond kmax=60 is bounded by 8.44e-04. The SUNSET VERDICT is certified robust to the full 8.45e-04 envelope below)

claims.name: single_J0_conservative
claims.detail: (J(r_hat(1e-3))=0.2764, J(r_hat(2e-3))=0.2565 both <= J0=0.2896: using the single anchor J0 OVER-estimates the sunset bound at the endpoint -> conservative)

claims.name: frozen_U4_endpoint_reproduced
claims.detail: (frozen-coupling endpoint x0.970 reproduces U4 x0.97 -- REGRESSION sanity check vs the old estimator, NOT load-bearing)

claims.name: sunset_axis_endpoint_positive
claims.detail: (dressed endpoint x1.129 > 1: the SUNSET-AXIS endpoint no longer individually fails; the U4 SUNSET-AXIS marginal failure was a frozen-coupling artefact. This is the sunset channel only -- SC-SCOPE stays OPEN on GHAT4-PERTRANSFER + R-U6-1)

claims.name: perJ_ratio_at_least_J0_ratio
claims.detail: (per-dressing-J ratio x1.275 >= J0 ratio x1.129: confirms J0 is the conservative choice)

claims.name: endpoint_margin_thin_not_comfortable
claims.detail: (x1.129 is a SIGN result, NOT a comfortable margin; in the joint inequality the ~13% can be consumed by the other channels)

claims.name: verdict_robust_to_M_envelope
claims.detail: (even at M-ENDPOINT + the full raw envelope (M=0.105798, the worse direction) the sunset ratio = x1.096 > 1: the sign verdict survives the quadrature uncertainty)
